title: Zen Weaver
description:
You walk through a spider web and [jitter][red]PANIC[/red][/jitter]!
But then, a [sine][blue]wave of calm[/blue][/sine] washes over you...

[sine]“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”[/sine]

How did you calm down so quickly?
An [orange]itsy bitsy[/orange] spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for [gold]gold[/gold].
notes: This event offers three ways to spend gold to modify your deck. [gold]Breathing Techniques[/gold] is always available and adds enlightenment cards, while the other two options are conditionally locked based on your current gold. Each choice shows a different continuation page with flavor-appropriate descriptions.
